source_code:
def 'capped_countdown_sum ('n, 'limit) {
    'total := 0
    'i := 0
    'result := 'total
    while ('i lt 'n) do
        'total := 'total + 'i
        if ('total gt 'limit) then
            'total := 'limit
            'result := 'total
            'i := 'i + 1
        else
            skip
            'result := 'total
            'i := 'i + 1
        fi
    od
    return 'total
}

paths.path_condition: (0 lt 'n) and (0 gt 'limit) and (1 lt 'n) and (2 gte 'n)
